note: AI-interpreted from pdfplumber raw text. Dole (18 deliveries) + JR Holland produce tickets (3). Late spring into early summer: UK strawberry at peak premium (£19–36 per tray). Lychee SA in season (3, 5, 21 Jun, £18/2kg = £9/kg), then Lychee China (27 Jun). Cherry Spain first entries (5 Jun 26/2kg at £7, 19 Jun 28/2kg at £7). Nectarine building in 10×500g punnets and 10×1kg format. Peach and Donut Peach Spain growing volumes. Watermelon Spain 4-6 per 20kg (£9–17.50), Cantaloupe Spain, Galia Spain, Piel de Sapo Spain all active. Satsuma Peru heavy across multiple grades (50–84 grade, £14–20/10kg). Clementine SA end-of-season (21 Jun, 3×£8/15kg). Pomegranate Peru (6/5kg, £12). Grape: Flame Egypt dominant (£15–17/10×500g), Prime Seedless SA/Egypt (£8–15), Itum Spain (26 Jun, first entry), Superior Spain (27 Jun). Avocado Spain 9 boxes 6 Jun (biggest avocado order in data). Starfruit Malaysia (7 Jun, £20/4kg = £0.83 each — exotic spot buy). Pears Forelle SA 10×800g prepacked (multiple). Leek France (17 Jun, £12.50/5kg). Lime Brazil (24 Jun). Tomato: big avocado+tomato order 6 Jun; Cherry Vine Spain, Piccolo Spain, Cherita Trio Spain. Veg: Potato Mids/Jumbo UK (25-28 Jun), Carrot UK (25 Jun). Holland (03/06): courgettes + vine tomatoes only. Holland (17/06): full summer veg range — courgettes, aubergines, lettuce, mushroom, peppers, vine tomatoes, Chinese leaf. Holland (20/06): similar + mixed peppers tri-colour, pointed red pepper.
